zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellen De Barden於1370年出生在英國越可爾約克時，她的父親John de Barden42歲，母親Alice Thirkell46歲。她於1397年與Sir John D’Aunay在英國越可爾艾史可利可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1440年在英國越可爾享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ellen De Barden于1370年出生在英国越可爾約克时，她的父亲John de Barden42岁，母亲Alice Thirkell46岁。她于1397年与Sir John D’Aunay在英国越可爾艾史可利可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1440年在英国越可爾享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Barden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Barden Park in Tonbridge, Kent, or Bardown in Ticehurst, Sussex, or Berden in Essex.
English: habitational name from any of the places in North and Yorkshire named Barden, from Old English bere ‘barley’ (or the derived adjective beren) + denu ‘valley’.

variants.name: Bearden
meanings: English (London): variant of Barden , Bardon 2, or from places in Devon and Cornwall called Beardon, from Old English burh ‘manor’ + dūn ‘hill’. In the British Isles the surname is now rare.

variants.name: Bardin
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Ó Bairdín, see Barden 4.
French: from a pet form of the ancient Germanic personal name Bardo, from barta ‘battle axe’ (see Bard 1).

variants.name: Bardon
meanings: English: habitational name from Bardon in Leicestershire, named with Old English berg ‘hill, mound, barrow’ + dūn ‘hill’, meaning ‘barrow hill’.
Irish: Anglicized form of Ó Bárdáin, see Barden 4.

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Ellen De Barden was born in 1370, in York, Yorkshire, England, her father, John de Barden, was 42 and her mother, Alice Thirkell, was 46. She married Sir John D’Aunay in 1397, in Escrick, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1440, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ellen De Barden est née en 1370, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John de Barden, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Alice Thirkell, avait 46 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John D’Aunay en 1397, à Escrick, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1440, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ellen De Barden 1370 in York, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Barden 42 und ihre Mutter Alice Thirkell 46. Sie hat 1397 in Escrick, Yorkshire, England Sir John D’Aunay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1440 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ellen De Barden è nata il nel 1370 nel York, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, John de Barden, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Alice Thirkell, aveva 46 anni. Lei sposato Sir John D’Aunay nel 1397, nel Escrick, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1440, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ellen De Bardenが1370年にイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークで生まれた時，父John de Bardenは42歳，母Alice Thirkellは46歳であった。1397年にイギリスヨークシュアイアエスクリックでSir John D’Aunayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1440年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ellen De Barden(이)가 1370년 영국 요르크실르 요르크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Barden(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Thirkell(은)는 46세였다. 그녀는 1397년 영국 요르크실르 스크릭에서 Sir John D’Aunay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1440년 영국 요르크실르에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ellen De Barden nasceu em 1370, em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Barden, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Alice Thirkell, tinha 46 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John D’Aunay em 1397, em Escrick, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1440, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ellen De Barden родилась в 1370 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Barden было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Thirkell, 46. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John D’Aunay в 1397 г. в местности эскрикк, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1440 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ellen De Barden nació en 1370, en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Barden, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Alice Thirkell, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Sir John D’Aunay en 1397, en Escrick, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1440, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años.
